note: Zep Cloud is a managed SaaS. Internal models/algorithms may change over time. Results reflect the system state on the test date.

sdk.note: Original scripts require 2.22.1. Adapted scripts require 3.x.

llm_answer.temperature: default (1) — gpt-5-mini does not support temperature=0
llm_answer.note: Original Zep scripts use gpt-4o-mini with temperature=0

embedding.note: Handled internally by Zep Cloud (not configurable). Graphiti open-source default is text-embedding-3-small (1024 dim).

retrieval.method: Graphiti hybrid search (edges + nodes with reranking)

round2.note: Aligned to M-flow top_k=10 for fair comparison

database.note: Managed by Zep Cloud SaaS (graph + vector internals not configurable)

known_bugs_preserved: blip_captions field name typo in ingestion (1226 image descriptions silently dropped)
